auth.title: Sign In
auth.subtitle: Use your configured account to access cloud sync.

trackShare.title: Track Sharing
trackShare.description: Import a shared track from a friend. Export still starts from the track details page.

wakeLock.active: Active: display sleep is currently blocked.
wakeLock.enabling: Enabling wake lock... keep this tab in foreground on Android.
wakeLock.unsupported: Keep screen awake is not supported on this browser/device.
wakeLock.failed: Unable to keep screen awake. Check battery saver and browser permissions.

deleteTrack.title: Confirm Delete
deleteTrack.description: This track and its lap history will be removed.

cards.trackCountHint: Current local and cloud track count for this account.
cards.adminAccessHint: Admin permission unlocks the management backend.

portrait.title: Wide Screen Required
portrait.heading: Use Dashboard on a wide-screen device

liveFeed.title: Live Feed
liveFeed.description: Reserved for real-time vehicle status, active sessions, and track operations.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Future modules can extend this area with pace trends, speed distribution, and driver comparisons.

professional.title: Professional Display Scope
professional.description: Dashboard will carry denser modules and management entry points. For now it provides a consistent professional shell ready for future expansion.

pitWall.title: Pit Wall
pitWall.description: Reserved for session windows, car status, and stint summaries.

events.title: Event Feed
events.description: Reserved for driver events, system alerts, and operation logs.

exports.title: Data Export
exports.description: Reserved for report export, session replay, and downstream delivery.

guidance.title: Guidance
guidance.description: Accounts with admin permission can enter the backend from the left rail or the main workspace action. Other modules stay as placeholders for now.

editor.selfGuard: Your current account cannot delete itself or remove its own admin access.

trackList.title: Saved Tracks
trackList.emptyDescription: Record a circuit or sprint track to start racing.

share.title: Share Track
share.summaryWithRecords: Share this track with {{count}} lap records.
share.summaryTrackOnly: Share only the track layout and reference lap, without lap history.
share.includeRecordsHelp: Turn this off if you only want to share the route and timing reference.

feedback.copyFailed: Clipboard write failed. Copy the text manually.
feedback.shareFailed: System share failed. Try copy instead.

import.title: Import Shared Track
import.heading: Paste a share code
import.description: Paste the text your friend sent. The imported track will be saved as a new local track.
import.placeholder: Paste the full shared text or the APEXTRACK code here

errors.invalid: This share code is invalid or incomplete.
errors.unsupported: This browser cannot read the compressed share format.

recordTrack.title: Record Track
recordTrack.waitingSpeedDescription: Accelerate past 10km/h to automatically set the start line heading.

trackDetails.noDetailedHistory: No detailed history available. Record new laps to see analysis.
trackDetails.deleteLapDescription: This lap will be removed permanently from history.

raceMode.gpsPermissionHelp: Some devices need an explicit Enable GPS tap before the location permission prompt will appear.
raceMode.updateReferencePrompt: Would you like to update the reference track with this new record?

errors.unsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser
errors.secureContextRequired: Safari requires HTTPS for GPS on mobile devices. Open this app via https:// or localhost.
errors.permissionDenied: Location permission denied. In Safari: Settings > Safari > Location > Allow, then reload.
errors.positionUnavailable: GPS position unavailable. Move to open sky and ensure Location Services is enabled.
errors.timeout: GPS timeout. Please keep the page active and tap Retry GPS.
errors.requestSlow: GPS request is taking too long. Keep the app in foreground and tap Retry GPS.
errors.permissionPromptNoResponse: No response from location permission prompt. Check browser site permissions and system Location setting, then retry.
